
# Toward a Unified Perspective

## Chapter Purpose

Explore whether information, systems theory, emergence, and complexity could provide a unified framework connecting life and consciousness.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
